process.title: Process
process.subtitle: The Work Journey
process.desc: From raw data to defensible results in 6 steps. Clear, predictable, and rigorous.
process.s1.title: Upload Data
process.s1.desc: Securely upload your datasets. We sign strict NDAs for every project to ensure 100% privacy.
process.s2.title: Sanity Check
process.s2.desc: We perform a free initial validation to ensure your data is clean and ready for analysis before you pay.
process.s3.title: Secure Payment
process.s3.desc: Once validated, process payment securely to officially kickstart the deep analysis phase.
process.s4.title: Deep Analysis
process.s4.desc: Rigorous cleaning, hypothesis testing, and regression modeling performed by senior biostatisticians.
process.s5.title: 10-Day Delivery
process.s5.desc: Receive publication-ready tables (APA style), high-res graphs, and a full methodology report.
process.s6.title: Success
process.s6.desc: You submit your thesis with confidence, supported by defensible, accurate results.
footer.tagline: Providing defensible, high-accuracy statistical analysis for researchers, students, and institutions.
services.title: Our
services.s1.title: Statistical Consulting
services.s1.desc: Expert guidance on research design, methodology, and data strategy.
services.s2.title: Data Analysis
services.s2.desc: Comprehensive cleaning, processing, and advanced modeling of your data.
services.s3.title: Publication Support
services.s3.desc: Helping you get your research ready for high-impact journals.
services.custom.title: Need a custom solution?
services.custom.desc: We handle everything from simple surveys to complex clinical trials. Talk to us about your specific research needs.
about.title: About
about.p1: Naggar Analytics is a leading provider of high-accuracy statistical analysis services. We specialize in helping researchers, students, and institutions turn raw data into defensible, publication-ready results.
about.p2: Our team of senior biostatisticians ensures that every project meets the highest standards of academic and professional rigor.
contact.title: Contact
contact.inquiryDesc: Have a project in mind? Let's discuss how we can help you with your data.
contact.sendDesc: For the fastest service, please log in and open a new request directly in your dashboard.
faq.title: FAQ
faq.q1: How long does the analysis take?
faq.a1: Standard analysis projects are delivered within 10 business days.
faq.a2: Yes, we prioritize data privacy and sign strict NDAs for every project.
faq.q3: Which citation styles do you support?
faq.a3: We primary support APA, but can adapt to Vancouver, MLA, or Harvard styles.
faq.q4: What statistical software do you use?
faq.a4: We use SPSS, R, STATA, and Python depending on the project requirements.
careers.title: Join Our
careers.desc: We're building a team of passionate data professionals committed to delivering rigorous, high-quality statistical analysis. All roles are fully remote.
careers.whyJoin: Why do you want to join Naggar Analytics?
careers.whyPlaceholder: Tell us what motivates you to join our team and how you can contribute...
careers.submittedMsg: Thank you for applying. We'll be in touch soon.

sig.subtitle: Data verification
sig.desc: We don't guess. We verify that your results aren't just random chance, but meaningful patterns.
